title: Emergency Dispatch Academy
subtitle: Learn how to stay calm, call 911 first, and guide people safely.

steps.title: Call 911 First
steps.body: When a real emergency starts, the first priority is calling 911 or the local emergency hotline. Dispatchers can send help while you keep the caller calm.
steps.coach_tip: Teach players that asking for help early is a strength, not a mistake.

steps.title: Stay Calm and Identify the Problem
steps.body: Players should learn to identify what kind of emergency is happening: fire, smoke, electrical danger, gas leak, or trapped people. Clear answers help responders move faster.
steps.coach_tip: Start with simple scenarios and clear choices for younger learners.

steps.title: Protect People Before Property
steps.body: The safest answer is usually the one that protects lives first. Evacuate when needed, avoid dangerous actions, and never take risks just to save belongings.
steps.coach_tip: Reward answers that prioritize safety, distance, and calling trained responders.

steps.title: Look for Hints! 💡
steps.body: Before you pick an answer, look for the 💡 hint button! Hints will explain why some choices might be dangerous — without giving away the answer. Use them to learn!
steps.coach_tip: Hints teach critical thinking by explaining consequences rather than just telling the answer.

steps.title: Answer in English, Tagalog, or Taglish!
steps.body: You can answer in English, Tagalog, or Taglish — the game understands all three! Kahit Tagalog o Taglish ang sagot mo, naiintindihan ng game! 🇵🇭
steps.coach_tip: Filipino language support makes the game more accessible to Philippine students.

steps.title: Easy Mode Uses Choices
steps.body: Easy difficulty uses guided multiple choice responses so children can focus on recognizing the safest action. This mode should always stay open by default.
steps.coach_tip: Use this as the default onboarding mode for first-time players.

steps.title: Certified Mode Uses Typed Answers
steps.body: The typed NLP mode is for certified learners inside the e-learning flow. Players must complete the required certification before they can unlock free-response dispatching.
steps.coach_tip: This keeps advanced assessment gated behind training readiness.
